metas.name: Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie -Walpurgisnacht: Rising-
metas.description:
Genres: Mahou Shoujo Tags:Magic/Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast/Philosophy/Witch/Super Power/Urban Fantasy/Kuudere/Guns/Curses The 10th anniversary online event for the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica anime revealed that the franchise is getting a new anime film titled Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten. The film will be an official sequel to the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Hangyaku no Monogatari film that opened in October 2013. The tagline on the new film's visual reads, "Now, let's continue the story."

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

metas.name: THE RIBBON HERO
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo Tags:Shoujo/Magic/Swordplay/Superhero/Fairy Tale/Royal Affairs/Female Protagonist/Cyborg/Crossdressing/Tomboy/LGBTQ+ Themes Princess Sapphire of the lost kingdom. Stripped of everything in her homeland, Silverland, by the calamity known as "Nergal," she arrived in Goldland at the very depths of despair. While carrying the weight of her past, she began to find a glimmer of hope through the kindness of the people. Yet, as if mocking her peaceful daily life, the calamity "Nergal" appears once more. The same despair that reduced her homeland to ashes is now threatening to steal the light from this land as well.

"No more loss for me. No more loss for anyone.”

Wiping way her fears of sorrow, the young girl takes up her sword.
This is the story of a hero who ties her ribbon and resolves to defy fate.

(Source: THE RIBBON HERO Official Site)

Note: This anime is inspired by Osamu Tezuka's manga "Princess Knight”.

metas.name: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Drama, Mystery, Thriller Tags:Female Protagonist/Coastal/Primarily Female Cast/Death Game Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.

This is the story of a certain insane world.

Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games.

Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki continues her journey. A game where death is always close at hand. Next, she takes on a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Eight players have gathered there. Among them are seasoned veterans whom Yuuki knows. The game is "Cloudy Beach." Beyond the wall, only those who have crossed the wall remain. Today, once again, she makes a living playing deadly games.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

metas.name: Unanswered//butterfly: Sword Art Online
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Full CGI/Virtual World/Medieval The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality.

Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK (Player Killer) known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party—was the Black Swordsman.

Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

Note: Released as part of the Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online's game limited edition.

metas.name: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to
metas.description:
Genres: Romance Tags:Heterosexual The story centers on two Tokyo high schoolers who connect over a painting of fireworks. They trace the painting to the Nagaoka Fireworks Festival in Niigata, one of Japan's three major fireworks festivals, and to a mysterious promise that connects the two to the past.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

metas.name: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life Tags:Animals/Primarily Animal Cast/Surreal Comedy/Mermaid Based on a series of Chiikawa comics posted on X by Nagano from March to November 2023, known as the "Siren Arc".

One day, while Chiikawa and Hachiware were relaxing in the square, Usagi suddenly appeared with a flyer stuck to its face. When Hachiware checked the flyer, it was an invitation reading “Special Invitation to a Special Island.”

Lured by promises like “Get 100x rewards for simple island quests!” and “Limited-edition island ramen, exclusive sweets—sweet and spicy treats all practically free!”, Chiikawa and the others decided to go on the island retreat. Boarding the ship alongside Rakko, who was suspicious of the flyer's contents, the group landed on the island... only to find something waiting for them there...!?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

metas.name: Wareware wa Uchuujin
metas.description:
Genres: Drama Tags:Coming of Age/Rotoscoping One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than thirty years, this gentle, contemplative story invites the audience to reflect on the meaning of life through the paths their lives take.

(Source: NOTHING NEW)

metas.name: Shiranuhi
metas.description:
Genres: Supernatural Tags:Coastal The short is set in a coastal town in Kumamoto at the tail end of summer 1996. The 10-year-old boy Minato lives a precarious life with his drunkard father. Minato's only source of strength is Ben-chan, a goddess in the form of a young girl that appeared in Benten Island. The time he spends with her are the only times where he feels like himself. But when he is about to be separated from Ben-chan due to being sent to a children's home, Minato prays to a Shiranuhi, a mysterious light floating above the sea, to grant him one wish. His wish, filled with hatred towards his father, eventually becomes a curse.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Note: Initially teased at AnimeJapan 2024 in the CoMix Wave Films booth, a visual of this project was shown off with a description being a new animation project by a "rookie director".

metas.name: Majo no Tani no Yoru
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags: A short film only screened at the Cinema Orion at Ghibli Park in Nagakute.

The film is set in Ghibli Park's "Valley of the Witches" and is the first original animated short film created by Studio Ghibli for Ghibli Park.

metas.name: Crayon Shin-chan: Kikikaikai! Ora no Youkai Vacation
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy Tags: The Nohara family go to Hiroshi's hometown of Akita to attend a famous fireworks festival during the summer. However, an incident causes youkai to escape from their land and will wreak havoc in Akita and in other areas throughout Japan. The Nohara family then go to the land of youkai and find themselves in a mysterious yet nostalgic world, where they go on an unpredictable adventure.

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Soreike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Fantasy Tags: Pantan is a red panda who seeks to find the treasure thought to be in a rainbow star in the night sky, in order to keep a promise made to an adventurer long ago. When Pantan and Anpanman encounter each other, Anpanman lends his abilities to help out Pantan.

(Source: Anime News Network)
